name: almi-goethe
description: AlmiGoethe — AI-powered Goethe-Zertifikat German practice in the AlmiWorld family. Four modules (Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen) at six CEFR levels (A1–C2), scored per module as a points estimate with a 60% pass mark, no fabricated composite. Separate product (almigoethe.almiworld.com). Original German content — never copied from the Goethe-Institut. Practice estimates only; confirm the level you need with the Goethe-Institut.

scripts.build: node scripts/seo/fork-hygiene-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/uniqueness-gate.mjs && npm run gate:rule7 && npm run gate:titles && npm run gate:real-entity:proof && npm run gate:real-entity && prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build && npm run seed:prod
scripts.gates: npm run gate:rule7 && npm run gate:titles && npm run gate:real-entity:proof && npm run gate:real-entity
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:lesen && npm run seed:hoeren && npm run seed:schreiben && npm run seed:sprechen
